ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "year_start" INTEGER /* Year the player started their career */,
  "year_end" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their career */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position(s) played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the player attended */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* The player's hometown */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The player's nationality */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Player's Instagram handle */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the college is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the college is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the college's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_colleges" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "award_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the player played for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* The coach's hometown */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The coach's nationality */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's image */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Coach's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Coach's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the player played under the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "coach_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the draft pick */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player drafted */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the player played */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the player attended */,
  "scout_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the scouts about the draft pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_drafts" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" REAL /* Assists by the player */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "steals" REAL /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Number of turnovers */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_star_games" (
  "all_star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each All-Star Game appearance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the All-Star Game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("all_star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_star_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
